sections.heading: Clinqup Property Chatbot
sections.text:
| Document Version | 1.0                   |
| ---------------- | --------------------- |
| Prepared By      | Anang Tomar           |
| Date             | June 29, 2026         |
| Status           | Draft                 |
| Confidentiality  | Internal – Restricted |
[Page 2]

sections.heading: 1. Executive Summary
sections.text:
Clinqup is an Indian real estate platform that connects land property buyers and sellers through an online marketplace. To increase buyer engagement and reduce the time sellers spend answering repetitive property questions, Clinqup is building an AI-powered chatbot called the Property Chatbot.
The Property Chatbot is a REST API service that integrates with Clinqup's existing messaging infrastructure. It uses the Anthropic Claude large-language model (LLM) to automatically answer buyer questions about listed properties and to generate realistic dummy buyer inquiries for demonstration and onboarding purposes. The service is containerised with Docker and deployed via a fully automated GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.
This document defines the business requirements, functional and non-functional specifications, constraints, assumptions, and success metrics for the Property Chatbot project.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

sections.heading: 2. Business Objectives & Goals
sections.text:
The following SMART goals guide the Property Chatbot initiative:
| ID   | Goal                                    | Measurable Target                                                                                                                                                                  | Business Rationale                                                                         | Target Date                       |
| ---- | --------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------- |
| G-01 | Automate Buyer Query Handling           | Reduce the average time a seller waits before a buyer question is answered from >2 hours to <30 seconds for property-related questions by automating responses via the AI chatbot. | Reduce manual seller workload, improve buyer experience, and increase platform stickiness. | Q3 2026                           |
| G-02 | Multi-Language Engagement               | Support English, Hindi, and Hinglish so that ≥85 % of Clinqup's target user base (Tier-2/Tier-3 Indian cities) can interact with the bot in their preferred language.              | Lower the language barrier for non-English-speaking buyers and sellers.                    | Q3 2026                           |
| G-03 | Increase Listing Conversion             | Increase the share of chat conversations that result in a site visit or inquiry form submission by 15 % compared to the pre-chatbot baseline.                                      | Drive measurable revenue impact through higher lead conversion.                            | Q4 2026 (post-launch measurement) |
| G-04 | Dummy Inquiry Generation for Onboarding | Allow newly listed properties with zero real buyer messages to display realistic sample conversations, reducing the 'empty chat' problem for new sellers.                          | Improve seller confidence in the platform and reduce early churn.                          | Q3 2026                           |
| G-05 | CI/CD & Quality Assurance               | Achieve zero-downtime deployments with a fully automated test + build + push pipeline that runs on every merge to main and blocks bad releases via automated tests.                | Maintain system reliability as the codebase evolves.                                       | Ongoing                           |

## Clinqup Property Chatbot
| Document Version | 1.0                   |
| ---------------- | --------------------- |
| Prepared By      | Anang Tomar           |

## 1. Executive Summary
Clinqup is an Indian real estate platform that connects land property buyers and sellers through an online marketplace. To increase buyer engagement and reduce the time sellers spend answering repetitive property questions, Clinqup is building an AI-powered chatbot called the Property Chatbot.
The Property Chatbot is a REST API service that integrates with Clinqup's existing messaging infrastructure. It uses the Anthropic Claude large-language model (LLM) to automatically answer buyer questions about listed properties and to generate realistic dummy buyer inquiries for demonstration and onboarding purposes. The service is containerised with Docker and deployed via a fully automated GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.
This document defines the business requirements, functional and non-functional specifications, constraints, assumptions, and success metrics for the Property Chatbot project.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

## 2. Business Objectives & Goals
The following SMART goals guide the Property Chatbot initiative:
| ID   | Goal                                    | Measurable Target                                                                                                                                                                  | Business Rationale                                                                         | Target Date                       |
| ---- | --------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------- |
| G-01 | Automate Buyer Query Handling           | Reduce the average time a seller waits before a buyer question is answered from >2 hours to <30 seconds for property-related questions by automating responses via the AI chatbot. | Reduce manual seller workload, improve buyer experience, and increase platform stickiness. | Q3 2026                           |
| G-02 | Multi-Language Engagement               | Support English, Hindi, and Hinglish so that ≥85 % of Clinqup's target user base (Tier-2/Tier-3 Indian cities) can interact with the bot in their preferred language.              | Lower the language barrier for non-English-speaking buyers and sellers.                    | Q3 2026                           |
| G-03 | Increase Listing Conversion             | Increase the share of chat conversations that result in a site visit or inquiry form submission by 15 % compared to the pre-chatbot baseline.                                      | Drive measurable revenue impact through higher lead conversion.                            | Q4 2026 (post-launch measurement) |
| G-04 | Dummy Inquiry Generation for Onboarding | Allow newly listed properties with zero real buyer messages to display realistic sample conversations, reducing the 'empty chat' problem for new sellers.                          | Improve seller confidence in the platform and reduce early churn.                          | Q3 2026                           |
| G-05 | CI/CD & Quality Assurance               | Achieve zero-downtime deployments with a fully automated test + build + push pipeline that runs on every merge to main and blocks bad releases via automated tests.                | Maintain system reliability as the codebase evolves.                                       | Ongoing                           |
